NotFound.description: The greenhouse, profile, or assignment does not exist.

ValidationFailed.description: A value is out of range or violates a setpoint/threshold invariant; the body names the violated bound.

Unauthorized.description: (2b) Missing or invalid bearer token. In 2a the API is unauthenticated on the trusted Docker network and this response does not occur (RFC-009).

Forbidden.description: (2b) Authenticated but lacking the operator role required for this write (platform security §4).
